guide_sections.heading: Pull for Green Orbs!
guide_sections.content: Green orbs have the best value on this banner with both New Year Peony and New Year Dagr colorsharing. These two are the best units on this banner by a large margin and should be your targets with your free summons. New Year Peony is still a fantastic support unit to this day with her exclusive assist Gentle Dream and her ability to refresh an ally's action on-demand with her Duo Skill. New Year Dagr is an offensive  …[truncated]

guide_sections.heading: Should You Pull From This Summon?
guide_sections.content: Don't spend your orbs here! While both New Year Peony and New Year Dagr are good units that can still be relevant in today's metagame, we recommend saving your orbs and using it instead on either Emblem Lyn's debut banner or on the Greetings to You banner. The focus heroes available on those banners are a tier above the heroes on this banner, and your orbs are better spent attempting to summon for the Emblem Heroes,  …[truncated]

guide_sections.heading: Pull for NY! Alfonse!
guide_sections.content: The best unit from this summon is New Year Alfonse. With default skills like Close Counter and Special Spiral, this unit is ready to go without even needing to inherit additional skills. With the addition of his powerful duo skill which charges his special and boosts his stats, this is a great unit for Arena, Aether Raids, and all other player modes. New Year Selkie is an excellent pull as well. She has the new skill …[truncated]

guide_sections.heading: Should You Pull From This Summon?
guide_sections.content: Don't spend your orbs here! The heroes in this banner, while still usable, do not stand up to modern units. New Year Alfonse is the exception with his Duo Skill, but he too has some weaknesses that need to be addressed. We recommend you save your orbs instead for future banners. Pull if you want their skills All of the focus heroes from this summon have very useful skills that you may want another unit to inherit. Se …[truncated]
